lever.name: pinv V-column scaled coefficient scratch
lever.description: precompute each accepted V[:,l] coefficient scaled by 1/sigma[l] plus a nonzero flag before the existing pinv_svd l -> i -> j reconstruction update

isomorphism.result_update_order: unchanged l -> i -> j loop order
isomorphism.floating_point_operations: same vil * inv once per nonzero i and same result[i,j] += vil_inv * u_cols[l,j]
isomorphism.output_order: row-major n x m output unchanged
isomorphism.errors: dtype, shape, and error behavior unchanged

proof.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-pinv-vcols-proof cargo test -p fj-lax --lib pinv -- --nocapture
coverage: square and tall matrix public pinv paths

provisional_cross_worker.decision: not used for keep gate; diagnostic only because baseline worker differed

same_worker_gate.clean_source_baseline_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-pinv-vcols-baseline cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/pinv_256x128_f64 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3 --sample-size 10
same_worker_gate.candidate_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=vmi1149989 RCH_WORKERS=vmi1149989 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-pinv-vcols-candidate-vmi1149989 cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/pinv_256x128_f64 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3 --sample-size 10

decision.reason: matched same-worker median and conservative speedups fail Score >= 2.0; source restored

next_route: Do not retune pinv_svd V coefficient scratch. Reprofile restored source and route to the next profile-backed primitive; if GEMM remains top, pursue a different exact-order structural primitive or explicit tolerance-contract work for recursive kernels.
